Businesses that provide a service or product for use by other businesses.
BUSINESS_AND_CONSUMER_SERVICES - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
An organization that provides consumer services for a variety of products for used by the public.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
Top level category for places that provide professional services to other businesses, such as printing, photocopying, graphic design, marketing, advertising and other general business services.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES_ATM - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A computer terminal that allows bank customers to deposit, withdraw, or transfer funds without the assistance of a bank teller.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES_BANKING - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
Businesses that specialize in the maintenance, lending, exchange, or issuance of money.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES_CAR_DEALER_SALES - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
Businesses that sell new automobiles and motorcycles.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES_CAR_RENTAL - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory

Businesses that provide automotive repair services.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES_COMMUNICATION_MEDIA - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
Businesses that provide communication services.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES_EV_CHARGING_STATION - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
Businesses that provide recharging services for electric vehicles.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES_FUELING_STATION - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
Businesses that sell fuel for vehicles, such as petrol, electricity etc.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES_INDUSTRY - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
Businesses that employ people in and around the city in which it is located.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES_MONEY_CASH - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
Businesses that provide money related services.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES_PETROL_GASOLINE_STATION - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
Businesses that sell fuel, oil, and other motoring supplies.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES_POLICE_FIRE_EMERGENCY - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
Municipal emergency services.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES_POST_OFFICE - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
An office or station that receives, sorts, dispatches and delivers mail to a specific area or region.
BUSINESS_AND_SERVICES_TOURIST_INFORMATION - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory

CalculateRouteCallback - Interface in com.here.sdk.routing
A function which is called by the RoutingEngine after route calculation has completed.
calculateTrafficOnRoute(Route, int, int, double, CalculateTrafficOnRouteCallback) - Method in class com.here.sdk.routing.RoutingEngine
Asynchronously calculates the traffic along an EV car route starting from the index of the last traveled route section and an offset in meters from the last visited position on the section.
calculateTrafficOnRoute(Route, int, int, CalculateTrafficOnRouteCallback) - Method in class com.here.sdk.routing.RoutingEngine
Asynchronously calculates the traffic along a route starting from the index of the last traveled route section and an offset (in meters) from the last visited position on the section.
CalculateTrafficOnRouteCallback - Interface in com.here.sdk.routing
A function which is called by the RoutingEngine after route traffic calculation has completed.

The day version of the logistics hybrid map scheme catering to the needs of dispatchers, fleet managers and delivery drivers, highlighting and featuring map elements relevant to logistics use cases.

lookAt(GeoBox) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to look at the given geo-box, preserving current orientation and zooming at the center of viewport.
lookAt(GeoBox, GeoOrientationUpdate) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCamera
Makes the camera look at the specified geodetic area.
lookAt(GeoBox, GeoOrientationUpdate, Rectangle2D) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCamera
Makes the camera look at the specified geodetic area and pass a rectangle which specifies where the area should appear inside of the map view.
lookAt(GeoBox, GeoOrientationUpdate, Rectangle2D) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Create an update to look at the given geo-box and fit it inside the given rectangle.
lookAt(GeoBox, Rectangle2D) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to look at the given geo-box and fit it inside the given rectangle, preserving current orientation and zooming at the center of view rectangle.
lookAt(GeoCoordinates) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCamera
Makes the camera look at a new geodetic target, while preserving the current orientation and distance to the target.
lookAt(GeoCoordinates, GeoOrientationUpdate, MapMeasure) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCamera
Makes the camera look at the geodetic target with the given zoom and orientation.
lookAt(GeoCoordinates, MapMeasure) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCamera
Makes the camera look at the geodetic target with the given zoom.
lookAt(GeoCoordinatesUpdate) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to position the map camera to look at the given target, preserving the current orientation at look-at target and map measure.
lookAt(GeoCoordinatesUpdate, GeoOrientationUpdate) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to position the map camera to look at the given target with the given orientation preserving the current map measure (zoom level/distance/scale) Any target or orientation sub-element value that is not finite will be excluded from the update.
lookAt(GeoCoordinatesUpdate, GeoOrientationUpdate, MapMeasure) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to position the map camera to look at the given target with the given orientation and map measure.
lookAt(GeoCoordinatesUpdate, GeoOrientationUpdate, List<GeoCoordinates>, Rectangle2D, MapMeasure, MapMeasure) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to position the camera to look at the given target with the given orientation and obeying map measure limits, so that the given geo locations are inside the given rectangle.
lookAt(GeoCoordinatesUpdate, MapMeasure) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to position the map camera to look at the given target with the given map measure preserving the current orientation at look-at target.
lookAt(List<GeoCoordinates>, Rectangle2D, GeoOrientationUpdate, MapMeasure) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Create an update to look at the given geo locations and fit them inside the given rectangle, in accordance with a map measure limit.

MAP_CONTENT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScene.MapPickFilter.ContentType
Pickable map content currently consists of: Embedded carto POI markers that by default are available on the map. Traffic incidents that are visible when they are enabled using MapScene.enableFeatures(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>) with MapFeatures.TRAFFIC_INCIDENTS. Vehicle restrictions are only available for the Navigate license.

Offline map data is incomplete for the requested operation.
MAP_SCENE_ADDITION_ORDER_DEPENDENT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.DrawOrderType
Draw order depends on the order of map item addition to a map scene.
MAP_SCENE_ADDITION_ORDER_INDEPENDENT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.DrawOrderType

offsetStart - Variable in class com.here.sdk.routing.SegmentReference

ONLINE_SEARCH - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.core.engine.PassThroughFeature

PolylineSimplifier - Class in com.here.sdk.core
PolylineSimplifier helps to reduce the number of points in the polyline by removing redundant elements using Douglas–Peucker algorithm, so that result stays within PolylineSimplifier.Options.

resetTrafficIncidentFilter() - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapContentSettings
Removes all filters regarding Traffic Incidents so that all incidents will be displayed, when the display of Traffic Incidents is enabled using MapScene.enableFeatures(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>) with MapFeatures.TRAFFIC_INCIDENTS.
resetTrafficRefreshPeriod() - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapContentSettings
Resets the traffic data (both flow and incidents) refresh period so the default traffic information validity time and the refresh period derived from the refresh period of the traffic server is used.

RESTRICTED_ACCESS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.search.EVAccessType

restrictedIfAxleWeightLessThanInKilograms - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle weight per axle is less than the weight in kilograms.
restrictedIfAxleWeightMoreThanInKilograms - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle weight per axle is more than the weight in kilograms.
restrictedIfGrossWeightLessThanInKilograms - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle gross weight is less than the weight in kilograms.
restrictedIfGrossWeightMoreThanInKilograms - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle gross weight is more than the weight in kilograms.
restrictedIfHigherThanInCentimeters - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle is higher than the height in centimeters.
restrictedIfLongerThanInCentimeters - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle is longer than the length in centimeters.
restrictedIfLowerThanInCentimeters - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle is lower than the height in centimeters.
restrictedIfNarrowerThanInCentimeters - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle is narrower than the width in centimeters.
restrictedIfOccupantsFewerThan - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the occupants number is fewer than the value.
restrictedIfOccupantsMoreThan - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the occupants number is more than the value.
restrictedIfShorterThanInCentimeters - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle is shorter than the length in centimeters.
restrictedIfWiderThanInCentimeters - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle is wider than the width in centimeters.

resultType - Variable in class com.here.sdk.search.StructuredQuery

RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SideOfDestination

RIGHT_DRIVING_SIDE - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.StreetAttributes
The driving on the street is done on the right side.
RIGHT_EXIT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Right exit maneuver, such as "Take the exit".
RIGHT_FORK - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Right fork maneuver, such as "Keep right".
RIGHT_RAMP - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Right ramp maneuver, such as "Join the highway".
RIGHT_ROUNDABOUT_ENTER - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Roundabout maneuver (right-hand traffic), such as "Enter the roundabout".
RIGHT_ROUNDABOUT_EXIT1 - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Roundabout maneuver (right-hand traffic), such as "Take the first exit at the roundabout".
RIGHT_ROUNDABOUT_EXIT10 - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Roundabout maneuver (right-hand traffic), such as "Take the tenth exit at the roundabout".
RIGHT_ROUNDABOUT_EXIT11 - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Roundabout maneuver (right-hand traffic), such as "Take the eleventh exit at the roundabout".
RIGHT_ROUNDABOUT_EXIT12 - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Roundabout maneuver (right-hand traffic), such as "Take the twelfth exit at the roundabout".
RIGHT_ROUNDABOUT_EXIT2 - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Roundabout maneuver (right-hand traffic), such as "Take the second exit at the roundabout".
RIGHT_ROUNDABOUT_EXIT3 - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Roundabout maneuver (right-hand traffic), such as "Take the third exit at the roundabout".
RIGHT_ROUNDABOUT_EXIT4 - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Roundabout maneuver (right-hand traffic), such as "Take the fourth exit at the roundabout".

Roundabout maneuver (right-hand traffic), such as "Take the fifth exit at the roundabout".
RIGHT_ROUNDABOUT_EXIT6 - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Roundabout maneuver (right-hand traffic), such as "Take the sixth exit at the roundabout".
RIGHT_ROUNDABOUT_EXIT7 - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction

RIGHT_ROUNDABOUT_EXIT8 - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Roundabout maneuver (right-hand traffic), such as "Take the eighth exit at the roundabout".
RIGHT_ROUNDABOUT_EXIT9 - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Roundabout maneuver (right-hand traffic), such as "Take the ninth exit at the roundabout".
RIGHT_ROUNDABOUT_PASS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Roundabout maneuver (right-hand traffic), such as "Pass the roundabout".
RIGHT_TURN - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction

RIGHT_U_TURN - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction

Use MapDownloader to download and install a Region. Prefetch map data into the map cache with the RoutePrefetcher for areas that have not been cached, prefetched or installed before.

SHOPPING - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
Top level category for places where consumer goods are commonly sold, such as clothing stores, grocery stores, hardware stores and other types of shopping centers.
SHOPPING_BOOKSTORE - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A business that sells books, magazines and other reading material.
SHOPPING_CLOTHING_AND_ACCESORIES - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory

SHOPPING_CONVENIENCE_STORE - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory

SHOPPING_DEPARTMENT_STORE - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory

SHOPPING_DRUGSTORE_PHARMACY - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory

SHOPPING_ELECTRONICS - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory

SHOPPING_FOOD_AND_DRINK - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A business that sells specialty products of a particular type of food or beverage.
SHOPPING_HAIR_AND_BEAUTY - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory

SHOPPING_HARDWARE_HOUSE_GARDEN - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A business that sells crafts, gardening, remodeling, or decorating items for the home.
SHOPPING_MALL_COMPLEX - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A complex of businesses that are co-located and share common services.

Indicates a Traffic Data endpoint.

TRAFFIC_FLOW_JAPAN_WITHOUT_FREE_FLOW - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapFeatureModes
Only available when Japan map is used.
TRAFFIC_FLOW_WITH_FREE_FLOW - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapFeatureModes
Traffic flow shows green lines when there is no traffic congestion.
TRAFFIC_FLOW_WITHOUT_FREE_FLOW - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapFeatureModes
Traffic flow does not show green lines when there is no traffic congestion.
TRAFFIC_INCIDENTS - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapFeatures
Traffic incidents.
TRAFFIC_INCIDENTS_ALL - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapFeatureModes
All available traffic incidents are shown.
TRAFFIC_LIGHTS - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapFeatures
Traffic lights.
TRAFFIC_LIGHTS_ALL - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapFeatureModes
All available traffic lights are shown.
TRAFFIC_TILES_FLOW - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.core.engine.PassThroughFeature
When set, then the corresponding MapFeature will not be blocked and online connections can be initiated by the HERE SDK to retrieve traffic flow data.
TRAFFIC_TILES_INCIDENTS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.core.engine.PassThroughFeature
When set, then the corresponding MapFeature will not be blocked and online connections can be initiated by the HERE SDK to retrieve traffic incident data.

Indicates a Traffic Vector Tile API endpoint.

Represents network traffic statistics for traffic vector tiles.

This interface provides traffic information from radio signals to other HERE SDK modules.
trafficDelay - Variable in class com.here.sdk.routing.TrafficOnSpan
The estimated extra time in seconds spent due to traffic delays along this traffic span.
TrafficEngine - Class in com.here.sdk.traffic
Use the TrafficEngine to get information about current traffic flow and incidents in an area specified by GeoBox, GeoCircle, or GeoCorridor.
TrafficEngine() - Constructor for class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficEngine
Creates a new instance of this class.
TrafficEngine(SDKNativeEngine) - Constructor for class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficEngine
Creates a new instance of this class.
TrafficFlow - Class in com.here.sdk.traffic
This class provides details about traffic flow along a GeoCorridor, inside a GeoCircle or a GeoBox, that represents particular path of the road network.
Backends for TrafficEngine and traffic vector tiles are different however backends may share the same data.
For additional information about fields, refer to Traffic API v7 API Reference: Traffic API v7.
TrafficFlowBase - Interface in com.here.sdk.traffic
This interface provides details about a traffic flow.
For additional information about fields, refer to Traffic API v7 API Reference: Traffic API v7.
TrafficFlowQueryCallback - Interface in com.here.sdk.traffic
Callback passed to following functions: TrafficEngine.queryForFlow(GeoBox, TrafficFlowQueryOptions, TrafficFlowQueryCallback) TrafficEngine.queryForFlow(GeoCircle, TrafficFlowQueryOptions, TrafficFlowQueryCallback) TrafficEngine.queryForFlow(GeoCorridor, TrafficFlowQueryOptions, TrafficFlowQueryCallback) The method will be called on the main thread when a search call has been completed.
TrafficFlowQueryOptions - Class in com.here.sdk.traffic
The options to specify how traffic flow data should be queried.

Creates a new instance.

VIOLATED_AVOID_CONTROLLED_ACCESS_HIGHWAY - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_DIFFICULT_TURNS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid difficult turns.
VIOLATED_AVOID_DIRT_ROAD - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_FERRY - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_PARK - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_RAIL_FERRY - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_SEASONAL_CLOSURE - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid seasonal closure.
VIOLATED_AVOID_TOLL_ROAD - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_TOLL_TRANSPONDER - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid toll booth that requires transponder.
VIOLATED_AVOID_TRUCK_ROAD_TYPE - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid restricted truck road types.
VIOLATED_AVOID_TUNNEL - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_U_TURNS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid u turns.
VIOLATED_BLOCKED_ROAD - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route uses roads blocked by traffic events or route did not manage to avoid the requested avoidBoundingBoxAreas or countries or segments.
VIOLATED_CARPOOL - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_CHARGING_STATION_OPENING_HOURS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Charging at the charging station planned at the destination of this section falls outside of opening hours.
VIOLATED_CRITICAL_RULE - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route has violoated a non-detailed critical rule.
VIOLATED_EMERGENCY_GATE - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route goes through an emergency gate.
VIOLATED_MIN_CHARGE_AT_CS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
The route can not reach all charging stations on the route with the minimum required charge, as the initial charge was to low.
VIOLATED_MIN_CHARGE_AT_DESTINATION - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
The route can not reach the waypoint, as the there are not enough charging stops available or the initial charge was to low.
VIOLATED_MIN_CHARGE_AT_FIRST_CS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
The route can not reach the first charging station with the minimum required charge, as the initial charge was to low.
VIOLATED_START_DIRECTION - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Start direction of the route is not as requested.
VIOLATED_TRANSPORT_MODE_IN_ROUTE_HANDLE_DECODING - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.RoutingError
Route handle decoding failed due to forbidden segments for the specified transport mode.
VIOLATED_TURN_RESTRICTION - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route uses a time-restricted turn.
VIOLATED_VEHICLE_RESTRICTION - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route uses a road which is forbidden for the given vehicle profile.
VIOLATED_ZONE_RESTRICTION - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route uses a road which is part of restricted zoneCategories requested to be avoided by user.

The following property violated_restrictions contains the notice detail information.
